zh-cn.exp_event_Utnapishtim_cryoPod_ongoing: $names$发现了一个封闭的冷冻仓，似乎还在运作中
zh-cn.exp_event_Utnapishtim_cryoPod_result_rep: $names$打开了冷冻仓发现里面空无一物
zh-cn.exp_event_Utnapishtim_cryoPod_result_sup: $names$打开了冷冻仓，找到了有用的物资
zh-cn.exp_event_Utnapishtim_cryoPod_result_lea: $names$在尝试打开冷冻仓的过程中不慎接触到了泄露的冷冻液

en-us.exp_event_Utnapishtim_cryoPod_ongoing: $names$ found a sealed cryopod that seems to be still operational.
en-us.exp_event_Utnapishtim_cryoPod_result_rep: $names$ opened the cryopod only to find it empty.
en-us.exp_event_Utnapishtim_cryoPod_result_sup: $names$ opened the cryopod and found useful supplies.
en-us.exp_event_Utnapishtim_cryoPod_result_lea: $names$ accidentally came into contact with leaking coolant while trying to open the cryopod.
